put.description: Updates the fulfilment fields of a wanted video entry for the currently authenticated user. Set IsFulfilled to true to mark as fulfilled, or false to reset it.

delete.description: Removes the specified video from the wanted list of the currently authenticated user. Returns 404 if the video was not on the user's wanted list. Requires API key authentication.

post.description: Adds the specified video to the wanted list for the currently authenticated user. Returns 204 if added or already on the wanted list. Returns 404 if the video does not exist. Requires API key authentication.

get.description: Returns a paged, sortable list of wanted videos for the currently authenticated user. Supports filtering by fulfilment status, site, actor, search term, and recency. Requires API key authentication.

Returns a seek-paged delta feed of wanted video rows for the currently authenticated user ordered by updatedAtUtc ascending, then videoId ascending. Includes created, updated, and soft-deleted rows as full payloads. Use since and the returned nextCursor to continue incrementally. Requires API key authentication.

post.description: Adds up to 50 videos to the wanted list for the currently authenticated user in a single request. Videos already on the wanted list are silently skipped. Unknown video IDs are silently omitted. Returns counts of added, already-existed, and not-found entries. Requires API key authentication.

Uploads a JPEG preview image to BunnyCDN, optionally linked to an existing video. When videoId is omitted, images are grouped by basedOnFileWithOsHash. A paired WebVTT file is required when PreviewImageType is SpriteSheet. Creates the VideoUserImage row and initial moderation state through shared moderation orchestration. Requires API key authentication.
Creates a moderation report for a video user image and returns the updated moderation target state. Duplicate reports by the same user return 409. Requires API key authentication.

get.summary: List video user images for a video
get.description: Returns all publicly visible user-submitted preview images for the requested video ordered by displayOrder, createdAtUtc, and id. Hidden, denied, and soft-deleted rows are excluded. Requires API key authentication.

get.summary: List video user images by OS hash
get.description: Returns all publicly visible unlinked user-submitted preview images for the requested 16-character OS hash ordered by displayOrder, createdAtUtc, and id. Linked, hidden, denied, and soft-deleted rows are excluded. Requires API key authentication.

get.summary: Get a video user image by ID
get.description: Returns a single publicly visible video user image. Hidden, denied, and soft-deleted rows are not returned. Requires API key authentication.

get.summary: Get incremental video user image changes
get.description: Returns a seek-paged current-state delta feed of video user image rows ordered by updatedAtUtc ascending, then id ascending. Includes created, updated, soft-deleted, and moderation-visibility updates as the current row payload. Requires API key authentication.
Returns a paged list of videos. Supports filtering by site ID and searching by video title or site title. Requires API key authentication.

post.description: Returns full details for up to 50 videos by their IDs. IDs that do not exist are silently omitted from the response. Requires API key authentication.

get.description: Returns full details for a single video, including site, network, images, alternative titles, and actors with their images. Requires API key authentication.
Returns a paged list of active filehash entries that are not linked to any video. Requires API key authentication.

schema.description: Allowed values: createdAtUtc, updatedAtUtc, submissionCount, filesize.

post.description: Returns a flat list of active filehash entries matching any supplied IDs, video IDs, hashes, filenames, or file sizes. Results can include unlinked rows whose videoId is null. Requires API key authentication.

get.description: Returns a paged list of active video filehash entries, including rows linked to videos and rows whose videoId is null. Supports up to 5000 rows per request, sorting by createdAtUtc, updatedAtUtc, submissionCount, or filesize, and filtering by video ID, site ID, verification state, and inclusive created/updated date ranges. Requires API key authentication.

schema.description: Allowed values: createdAtUtc, updatedAtUtc, submissionCount, filesize.

post.summary: Get video filehashes by video IDs
post.description: Returns all filehash entries for up to 100 requested video IDs grouped by video ID. Existing videos are included even when they have no filehashes; unknown video IDs are returned separately. Requires API key authentication.

get.summary: Get video filehashes by video ID
get.description: Returns all filehash entries for a single video ordered by newest first. Returns 404 when the video does not exist. Requires API key authentication.

Returns a seek-paged delta feed of video filehash rows ordered by updatedAtUtc ascending, then id ascending. Includes created, updated, and soft-deleted rows as full payloads. Use since and the returned nextCursor to continue incrementally. Supports optional video ID and site ID filters. Requires API key authentication.
Returns a paged list of sites ordered by title ascending. Supports filtering by search term matched against site title. Requires API key authentication.
Returns the current rate limit counter for the authenticated user, including requests used, remaining, and seconds until the oldest request expires from the sliding window.

get.summary: Search PreDb entries grouped by video
get.description: Searches canonical PreDb titles and returns matching linked PreDb entries grouped by video. 'q' (min 3 characters) is required unless 'releaseDate' is provided, in which case 'q' is optional. Each group includes video and site details. Capped at 500 video groups, no paging.
Returns a paged list of PreDb entries. Supports filtering by title or release group search, category, and release date range. Default sort is release date descending. Requires API key authentication.

Returns a paged list of canonical PreDb entries ordered by creation date descending. Linked video details are included when available; unlinked PreDb entries are also returned. Supports filtering by site ID and creation date range. Requires API key authentication.

post.description: Returns a flat list of active indexer filehash entries matching any supplied IDs, combined indexer source and indexer ID pairs, hashes, filenames, or file sizes. Requires API key authentication.

get.description: Returns a paged list of active indexer filehash entries. Supports up to 5000 rows per request, sorting by createdAtUtc, updatedAtUtc, submissionCount, or filesize, and filtering by indexer source, indexer ID, verification state, and inclusive created/updated date ranges. Requires API key authentication.

schema.description: Allowed values: createdAtUtc, updatedAtUtc, submissionCount, filesize.

get.description: Returns a seek-paged delta feed of indexer filehash rows ordered by updatedAtUtc ascending, then id ascending. Includes created, updated, and soft-deleted rows as full payloads. Use since and the returned nextCursor to continue incrementally. Supports optional indexer source and indexer ID filters. Requires API key authentication.
Returns the current API status and server timestamp. No authentication required.

delete.description: Unmarks the specified site as a favourite for the currently authenticated user. Returns 404 if the site was not in the user's favourites. Requires API key authentication.

post.description: Marks the specified site as a favourite for the currently authenticated user. Returns 204 if added or already a favourite. Returns 404 if the site does not exist. Requires API key authentication.

get.description: Returns a paged, sortable list of sites the currently authenticated user has favorited. Supports filtering by search term. Requires API key authentication.

Returns a seek-paged delta feed of favorite site rows for the currently authenticated user ordered by updatedAtUtc ascending, then siteId ascending. Includes created, updated, and soft-deleted rows as full payloads. Use since and the returned nextCursor to continue incrementally. Requires API key authentication.

delete.description: Unmarks the specified actor as a favourite for the currently authenticated user. Returns 404 if the actor was not in the user's favourites. Requires API key authentication.

post.description: Marks the specified actor as a favourite for the currently authenticated user. Returns 204 if added or already a favourite. Returns 404 if the actor does not exist. Requires API key authentication.

get.description: Returns a paged, sortable list of actors the currently authenticated user has favorited. Supports filtering by search term. Requires API key authentication.

Returns a seek-paged delta feed of favorite actor rows for the currently authenticated user ordered by updatedAtUtc ascending, then actorId ascending. Includes created, updated, and soft-deleted rows as full payloads. Use since and the returned nextCursor to continue incrementally. Requires API key authentication.

put.description: Updates a single filename row for a downloaded-from-indexer entry owned by the currently authenticated user. Returns 409 when the filename would duplicate another filename under the same parent.

delete.description: Hard-deletes a single filename row from a downloaded-from-indexer entry owned by the currently authenticated user. Returns 404 when the parent or filename does not exist.

put.description: Updates a downloaded-from-indexer entry for the currently authenticated user. User ID and video ID are immutable. Returns 409 when the parent uniqueness rule would be violated.

delete.description: Hard-deletes a downloaded-from-indexer entry for the currently authenticated user. Any child filename rows are deleted with it. Returns 404 when the entry does not exist.

post.description: Adds a single filename row to a downloaded-from-indexer entry owned by the currently authenticated user. Returns 409 when the filename already exists under the parent entry.

Creates a downloaded-from-indexer entry for the currently authenticated user, optionally including filename rows in the same request. The entry may be linked to a wanted video by videoId or left unlinked by passing null. Returns 404 when the referenced wanted video does not exist. Returns 409 when the parent uniqueness rule is violated.

get.description: Returns a paged list of actors. Supports free-text search by name or alias, and sorting by name or creation date. Default page size is 100, maximum is 500. Requires API key authentication.

post.description: Returns full details for up to 50 actors by their IDs. IDs that do not exist are silently omitted from the response. Requires API key authentication.

get.description: Returns full details for a single actor including all attributes, images, aliases, external links, and bios. Requires API key authentication.

ActorGender.description: Known values: Unknown (0), Female (1), Male (2), Intersex (3), Transmale (4), Transfemale (5), NonBinary (6).

FulfillmentApp.description: Known values: Sabnzbd (0), Nzbget (1), Filesystem (2), Other (3).

reason.description: Allowed values: NotRelatedToVideo, SpamOrPromotional, OffensiveOrProhibited, DuplicateOrLowQuality, MisleadingOrWrongPreview, CopyrightConcern, Other.
